{{Quote|This one Abednedo I worked with, Awls Ooteek, he said they caught a snippet that came from some far-off system. Adumar, I think. In Wild Space.|Brentin Lore Wexley, to [[Rae Sloane]]|<ref name="Empire's End">''[[Aftermath: Empire's End]]''</ref>}}
The '''Adumar system''' was a [[star system]] located in [[Wild Space]]<ref name="Empire's End" /> that contained [[Adumar]].<ref name="TFABG" /> Prior to the [[Battle of Jakku]], an [[Abednedo]] named [[Awls Ooteek]] told [[Brentin Lore Wexley]] that the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|rebels]] had intercepted an [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] transmission from a far-off system about a [[laboratory]] or a hidden facility, which they sent [[scout]]s to find but nothing ever came of it.<ref name="Empire's End" />

{{System-stub}}
